name: The wrong room
description:
You are a young guy who finally decides to come for a job interview.

True, there have never been such vacancies, but this did not alarm. The payment was high, so you didn't hesitate to go.

But unfortunately for you, it turned out to be not really a job or an interview at all...

Will you be able to withstand what will happen in this room?

Or is it subconsciously what you wanted deep down in your soul?

Attention!!!

The story is tied to feminization, hypno, feminisation, sissy, sissification, ntr and some other tags

I will be glad to hear your feedback.

Further is better.
creator: Modexon
